name: Cloud & Hybrid Cloud Services
description: Cloud strategy, migration, and management services across public, private, and hybrid cloud environments. Includes cloud readiness assessments, workload migration, cloud-native development support, and ongoing cloud operations (FinOps, governance, cost optimization).
differentiators: Multi-cloud competence across Azure, AWS, and GCP
Migration factory approach for large-scale cloud transitions
German-hosted private cloud options for data sovereignty
